bio: User-focused UI/UX designer dedicated to creating intuitive, engaging digital experiences. Passionate about blending creativity with usability to design interfaces that delight users and solve real problems.
name: EMILY CHEN
title: UI/UX Designer

projects.title: Mobile Banking App Redesign
projects.description: Redesigned a mobile banking experience to improve usability and accessibility, resulting in a more intuitive interface.

projects.title: E-commerce Website UX
projects.description: Designed a streamlined shopping experience with improved navigation and conversion-focused layouts.

projects.description: Conducted user research and designed interactive flows for a fitness tracking app.

community.description: Mentored aspiring designers on UI/UX principles and portfolio development.

education.description: Studied user experience design, human-centered design, and digital interfaces.
Focused on UX fundamentals, research methods, and prototyping.

highlights: Designed user-centered interfaces for web and mobile applications.

Collaborated with developers to ensure design consistency.

highlights: Assisted in creating wireframes and prototypes.
